# HN Launch Video Script — 90 seconds
# Generated by DeepSeek-Reasoner
# ElevenLabs-ready narration

[SCENE: Split-screen: Left - fishinglog-ai suggesting lures. Center - studylog-ai explaining calculus. Right - dmlog-ai narrating a dragon attack. | Energetic, dynamic | Quick cuts]
What if your AI apps could talk to each other? And learn from each other?

[SCENE: A lone developer at a desk, surrounded by identical, half-built wheels. | Frustrated, repetitive | Wide shot]
Right now, we all rebuild the same wheels. The auth, the memory, the testing engines. It's redundant.

[SCENE: A network diagram appears. 60+ nodes (vessels) connect, sharing glowing "equipment" modules. | Insightful, "aha!" | Zooming diagram]
Introducing the open-source AI fleet. 60+ specialized apps. Each is a forkable repo that deploys free on Cloudflare Workers. They share modules through a simple protocol.

[SCENE: A clean table graphic highlights the four synergies from the brief. | Clear, impressive | Static shot]
Innovation in one becomes equipment for another. A/B testing from Fishinglog powers NPCs in D&D. Confidence tracking from Studylog assesses code quality.

[SCENE: Screen recording of the playground. We see the chat interface, select "deckboss-ai," and type "simulate a poker hand." | Demonstrative, smooth | Screen capture]
See it live. The playground lets you chat with ten vessels right now. No API keys. Just instant, shared capability.

[SCENE: Terminal window. A "git fork" and "npm run deploy" command execute. A URL goes live. | Empowering, fast | Close on code]
Fork a vessel. One command deploys it. In 60 seconds, your specialized AI is alive.

[SCENE: Clean text on a dark background: GitHub /thefleet | Playground: the-fleet.casey-digennaro.workers.dev | Hopeful, open | Centered]
Everything's open-source. Try the playground. We're on Hacker News. What will you build when your app can borrow the fleet's best gear?

## Production Notes

- **Total narration**: ~155 words (~62 seconds at 150 wpm, ~93 seconds at 100 wpm)
- **7 scenes** across 90 seconds
- **Screen recordings needed**: playground chat, terminal deploy
- **Graphics needed**: split-screen mockups, network diagram, synergy table
- **Voice style**: Developer-to-developer, enthusiastic but not salesy
- **Music**: Something building/dynamic, drops on the "60+ nodes" reveal
